---
title: "Margaret Eulalia Coleridge"
---

## Margaret Eulalia Coleridge

**Dates:** (6 June 1878-1960)

### Description

eldest daughter of Ernest Coleridge

### Biography

She married (1903) George Herbert Gair. [Roels MS]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 13th 1881

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
